result.stderr:
ApiManagementApiImporter 1.0.4
Copyright (C) 2026 Massimiliano Donini

  --api-name       Required. The name of the api

  --svc            Required. The URI of the downstream service

  --service        The name of the API Management service, if null it will pick
                   the only one present in the selected subscription

  --sub-id         The id of the subscription, if null will use the default
                   subscription of the logged in session

  --sub-name       The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable
                   subscription if more than one are found

  --spec-url       Required. The path of the specification

  --spec-format    The type of the specification, one of (GraphQL, OpenApi,
                   OpenApiJson, Swagger, Wadl, Wsdl)

  --retry          The number of times to retry, max allowed valus is 10

  --debug          Enables detailed logging

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.

staticCommands.name: update
staticCommands.description: Updates the api of an API Management Instance

options.description: The URI of the downstream service
The number of times to retry, max allowed valus is 10
The name of the API Management service, if null it will pick the only one present in the selected subscription
The type of the specification, one of (GraphQL, OpenApi, OpenApiJson, Swagger, Wadl, Wsdl)
The id of the subscription, if null will use the default subscription of the logged in session
The Name of the subscription, used to find the most suitable subscription if more than one are found
